version.description: Version identifier in format vXXX (e.g., v001, v002)

based_on.description: Version this version is based on (null for initial)

accepted_patch_ids.description: Patch proposals included in this version

passed_gate_ids.description: Gate results that passed for this version

rejected_patch_ids.description: Patch proposals rejected during development of this version

breaking_changes.description: List of breaking changes if any

rollback_available.description: Whether rollback is available from this version

rollback_to.description: Version to rollback to if needed

skills_directory.description: The versioned skills directory relative path (e.g., 'skills-versions/v002')

original_skills_preserved.description: Whether the original .cursor/skills/ directory was preserved

skills_path.description: Absolute or workspace-relative path to the promoted skills directory

activation_note.description: How to explicitly use this version in future prompts
